text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Formulary File Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 2.2 2 

CONTRACT_ID 

LABEL: Part D Contract Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique number CMS assigns to each contract that a Part D plan has with CMS. This 
field is a key that links of Part D sponsor's contract and plan identifiers. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: CONTRACT_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 5 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 5-digit alpha/numeric value
